Class Trap

java.lang.Object
game.entities.GameEntity
game.entities.traps.Trap
All Implemented Interfaces:
Collidable, Renderable, Updatable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExplosiveBarrel, Landmine
public abstract class Trap extends GameEntity
Base type for map traps that can be triggered and apply explosion force.

  • Constructor Details

    • Trap

      protected Trap(double x, double y, double width, double height)
      Creates a trap with explicit bounds.
      Parameters:
      x - trap x-coordinate
      y - trap y-coordinate
      width - trap width
      height - trap height
